title: Peach Tempeh Stir-Fry
description: A garlicky, crispy post-workout meal featuring peach juice tempeh with a pescatarian-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Soaked Tempeh (as per tempeh package instructions)
ingredients.notes: If not provided, soak tempeh in water for at least 6 hours or overnight.

instructions: Prepare the soaked tempeh by patting it into a uniform shape if not already done.
Slice the peaches lengthwise, remove seeds, and slice them thinly. Finely chop the garlic cloves.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add sliced peaches to the skillet along with a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook for another 3-5 minutes or until they start to soften.
Gently fold the soaked tempeh into the skillet. Pour in peach juice and stir well to ensure all ingredients are evenly coated.
Cook for an additional 2-4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the tempeh is cooked through and slightly crispy on the outside.
